column13: No debris in the water, most of the flow confined to channel-left @ downstream gravel bar. Scour of gauge pool material & smaller cobbles likely occurred during freshet.
column14: Excellent quality ADCP mmt. Used BT, no MB detected. Used 1430 reading as it was best representative of average, actual DWL taken @ 1435 MST. No sediment plume observed during purge @ 1437, but quick connect found jammed with sediment, sightfeed end not fully inserted into N2 end - may be the cause of painting. Lubricated both quick connects @ 1440. Possible error in DWL from 04/28, similar reciprocal SRC found today. HG erratic after purge/maintenance. Allowed to settle out during mmt before resetting - still erratic post mmt. Reset anyway, may settle out over the next few hours.  ADCP by Moving Boat
